mapper.select: SELECT FE.EQUIP_ID , FE.CHAMBER_NO , FE.STATUS FROM FDC_EQUIPMENT FE ORDER BY FE.EQUIP_ID

SELECT T.MEASURED_SEC, T.GROUP_MAX_OID, T.EQUIP_ID, T.CURRENT_RECIPE, T.SENSOR_ID, T.SENSOR_NAME, T.RAW_VALUE, T.AVERAGE, T.UCL, T.LCL FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(FSD.MEASURED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS MEASURED_SEC, MAX(FSD.DATA_ID) OVER (PARTITION BY TO_CHAR(FSD.MEASURED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AS GROUP_MAX_OID, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY TO_CHAR(FSD.MEASURED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DESC) AS TIME_RANK, FSD.EQUIP_ID, FL.RECIPE_ID AS CURRENT_RECIPE, FSD.SENSOR_ID, FSM.SENSOR_NAME, FSD.RAW_VALUE, FFD.MEAN_VALUE AS AVERAGE, FR.UCL AS UCL, FR.LCL AS LCL, FSD.DATA_ID FROM FDC_SENSOR_DATA FSD JOIN FDC_LOT FL ON FSD.LOT_ID = FL.LOT_ID JOIN FDC_SENSOR_META FSM ON FSD.SENSOR_ID = FSM.SENSOR_ID LEFT JOIN FDC_FEATURE_DATA FFD ON FSD.EQUIP_ID = FFD.EQUIP_ID AND FSD.LOT_ID = FFD.LOT_ID AND FSD.SENSOR_ID = FFD.SENSOR_ID LEFT JOIN FDC_RULE FR ON FL.RECIPE_ID = FR.RECIPE_ID AND FSD.SENSOR_ID = FR.SENSOR_ID AND FR.RULE_TYPE = 'SPC' WHERE FSD.EQUIP_ID = #{equipId} AND FSD.DATA_ID > #{lastOid} ORDER BY FSD.DATA_ID ASC ) T
T.TIME_RANK <= 100
ORDER BY T.DATA_ID ASC
